expectations.evidence: aside element with data-testid='sidebar' containing nav links and user info
header element with data-testid='dashboard-header' containing breadcrumbs and actions
md: breakpoints used: md:relative, md:translate-x-0, md:hidden, md:px-6, lg:px-8
children: React.ReactNode in DashboardLayoutProps, rendered inside main element
Tailwind classes used throughout: flex, h-screen, overflow-hidden, rounded-xl, etc.
Only useState for sidebarOpen toggle (UI state allowed); no business logic
No fetch or axios calls in the component
